body.title: Wire retrieval success back to word graph: reinforce on resolution
body.result: Added reinforce_query_tokens() to hebbian_bridge.py: top-3 search results reinforce query co-occurrences + doc connections at boost=0.04/rank. Added set_word_graph() singleton so cortex.search() can call it without passing word_graph through every call site. main.py registers WG on boot. Called at both Phase 2 + Phase 1 fallback return paths. Gated by IGOR_HEBBIAN_BRIDGE env var (default off).
body.description: Word graph learns from cloud call deposits but has no retrieval-success feedback. When cortex.search() returns a memory that resolves the query (goal completed), the query tokens that led there get no reinforcement. Fix: (1) instrument cortex.search() to emit (query_tokens, top_result_rank, result_score) tuples; (2) on goal resolution, call word_graph.reinforce() on query tokens with boost proportional to 1/initial_rank; (3) log and monitor correlation. ML finding from deep-audit Panel 8.
